comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Iteration progress: ExecutionProfile is now concrete, and RalphContractResolver gained concrete execution validation for missing model, missing auth, unsupported thinking, and missing sandbox profile. Existing resolver tests cover controller vs child effective tools plus new model/thinking/sandbox validation. Remaining work: wire the shared resolver/applier through all Ralph command/config/agents/AgentControl boundaries and close the task after end-to-end usage is centralized.
